form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 9 at Broome Mdn August 2 over 1200m, 12 len behind Fire The Guard carrying 56kg at $5.50. First up last campaign second last of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside 3yo Mdn April 25 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Admire The Girl carrying 55kg at $15. Hard to get excited about her chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1). Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 9 at Broome Mdn August 2 over 1200m, 12 len behind Fire The Guard carrying 56kg at $5.50. First up last campaign second last of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside 3yo Mdn April 25 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Admire The Girl carrying 55kg at $15. Hard to get excited about her chances.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 4th of 8 at Dongara Mdn on April 4 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Another Chant with 53kg at $7. Previously second-up second last of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn F&M on January 15 over 1200m, 9 len behind Slick carrying 57kg at $15. Needs something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second run back. First-up after three months 4th of 8 at Dongara Mdn on April 4 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Another Chant with 53kg at $7. Previously second-up second last of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn F&M on January 15 over 1200m, 9 len behind Slick carrying 57kg at $15. Needs something easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stood flat footed and dwelt on jumping losing several lengths.
Momentarily inconvenienced over the concluding stages.
Shifted out under pressure in the final 100m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a eight months break. Finished off last campaign failed to finish at Kalgoorlie Mdn August 10 over 1100m. On debut ran last of 7 at Northam Mdn June 8 over 1000m, 11 len behind Point Of Conflict with 58kg at $15. Might be better off following this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Resuming after a eight months break. Finished off last campaign failed to finish at Kalgoorlie Mdn August 10 over 1100m. On debut ran last of 7 at Northam Mdn June 8 over 1000m, 11 len behind Point Of Conflict with 58kg at $15. Might be better off following this run.

form.formComment: At the latest run sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 13 at Ascot Mdn on April 3 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Belaura Star with 52.5kg at $5.50. The race before that 3rd in a small field at Belmont Park 3yo 0Mwly on March 25 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Eternal Wine carrying 53kg at $5.50. Well placed to improve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). At the latest run sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 13 at Ascot Mdn on April 3 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Belaura Star with 52.5kg at $5.50. The race before that 3rd in a small field at Belmont Park 3yo 0Mwly on March 25 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Eternal Wine carrying 53kg at $5.50. Well placed to improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced awkwardly, losing 1L. Raced fiercely through the early stages.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 34-day let-up. Last start raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 11 at Albany Mdn on March 8 over 1100m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Tawaaj with 56kg at $3. The start before that 4th of 9 at Bunbury Mdn on February 26 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Cassenite carrying 56kg at $18. Better than the last effort suggests and deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Comes here off a 34-day let-up. Last start raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 11 at Albany Mdn on March 8 over 1100m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Tawaaj with 56kg at $3. The start before that 4th of 9 at Bunbury Mdn on February 26 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Cassenite carrying 56kg at $18. Better than the last effort suggests and deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide for the majority of the race.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, second last of 8 at York on March 2 over 1200m, 5 len behind Wuigi with 57kg at $12. Last start ran last of 10 at Ascot Mdn on March 18 over 1500m, 26 len behind Billionaire's Row carrying 55kg at $71. Looks tested on what we have seen so far.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Third race start today. At debut, second last of 8 at York on March 2 over 1200m, 5 len behind Wuigi with 57kg at $12. Last start ran last of 10 at Ascot Mdn on March 18 over 1500m, 26 len behind Billionaire's Row carrying 55kg at $71. Looks tested on what we have seen so far.

form.formComment: At debut, did the work up front then tired 9th of 14 at Pinjarra 3yo Mdn on March 22 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Mamma Says So carrying 55kg at $7. Can do better. Looms as a serious contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). At debut, did the work up front then tired 9th of 14 at Pinjarra 3yo Mdn on March 22 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Mamma Says So carrying 55kg at $7. Can do better. Looms as a serious contender.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months ran last of 13 at Ascot Mdn on April 3 over 1100m, 18 len behind Melody Fair with 56kg at $51. Previously second-up ran last of 16 at Belmont Park Mdn on September 3 over 1200m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Hedawood with 56kg at $41. Not going well enough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Second-up. First-up after seven months ran last of 13 at Ascot Mdn on April 3 over 1100m, 18 len behind Melody Fair with 56kg at $51. Previously second-up ran last of 16 at Belmont Park Mdn on September 3 over 1200m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Hedawood with 56kg at $41. Not going well enough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early stages. Lay inwards in the straight.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 7th of 10 at York on March 15 over 1200m, 2 len behind Knockonheavensdoor carrying 56kg at $21. Second run from a spell 5th of 12 at York on April 6 over 1300m, 2.5 len behind I'll Keep Half carrying 56.5kg at $41. Don't underestimate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Third-up today. First-up 7th of 10 at York on March 15 over 1200m, 2 len behind Knockonheavensdoor carrying 56kg at $21. Second run from a spell 5th of 12 at York on April 6 over 1300m, 2.5 len behind I'll Keep Half carrying 56.5kg at $41. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming sat behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 12 at Belmont Park 3yo Mdn on February 25 over 1000m, 4 len behind Slip The Jab carrying 52kg at $101. Last start ran last of 7 at Ascot 3yo 0Mwly on April 3 over 1000m, 16 len behind Kings Court carrying 54kg at $101. Should come on at the third run back and is ready to play a significant role.
